name: skill_agent_server
description: Start a TCP server and communicate with a remote AI agent client. Triggered by phrases like 'start the server', 'listen on port', or 'agent-server-listen'.

arguments.name: host
arguments.description: Host address to bind the server (e.g. 0.0.0.0 or 127.0.0.1).

name: skill_agent_client
description: Connect to a remote AI agent server as a TCP client and communicate. Triggered by phrases like 'connect to <host>:<port>', 'agent-socket-open', or 'connect to the AI server'.

arguments.name: host
arguments.description: Host address of the server to connect to (e.g. 192.168.0.10).
